feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Dynamic Variants using TVARVC in SAP
entry.content:
Selection Screen Variants - Dynamic Variants

 

1.1       Dynamic Variants using TVARVC in SAP

Dynamic variants in SAP offer a powerful way to automate the selection of data based on specific conditions within purchase orders, reports, and other transactions. They utilize the TVARVC table to store variable values that adjust selection criteria dynamically.

Here's how dynamic variants work:

  1. Create a Selection Variant:
    • Navigate to the transaction or report where you want to use a dynamic variant.
    • Access the "Selection Screen" or "Variants" menu option.
    • Create a new selection variant.
  1. Define Selection Criteria:
    • Select "T" (TVARVC) for the selection variable type.
    • Choose the relevant variable name (usually related to a characteristic).
  1. Link to TVARVC Table:
    • In the TVARVC table, define:
      • Variable name: The same name chosen in step 2.
      • Low Value: The lower limit of the condition (e.g., minimum value).
      • High Value: The upper limit of the condition (e.g., maximum value).
      • Operator: The comparison operator (e.g., "=", ">", "<").
      • Reference: The characteristic code that triggers the condition.
  1. Assign Characteristic Values:
    • In the material master or other relevant master data, assign specific values to the characteristic referenced in the TVARVC table.

Example:

  • You want a purchase order report to display information based on order values.
  • Create a dynamic variant with a variable named "Z_VALUE" in the TVARVC table.
  • Set the "Low Value" to "1000" and the "High Value" to "5000".
  • Assign the characteristic "Z_ORDER_VALUE" to the "Reference" field.
  • In the material master, assign values to the "Z_ORDER_VALUE" characteristic for different materials (e.g., material A = 2000, material B = 4000).

Benefits of Dynamic Variants:

  • Automate selection criteria: Reduce manual adjustments for recurring conditions.
  • Improve accuracy: Eliminate errors from manual selection, ensuring data consistency.
  • Increase flexibility: Easily adjust selection parameters through the TVARVC table.

Additional Points:

  • Access Sequences: Control the order in which multiple dynamic variables are applied.
  • Condition Types: Define specific calculations or comparisons for dynamic values.
  • Authorization: Ensure only authorized users can create and modify dynamic variants.

By understanding and utilizing TVARVC and dynamic variants, you can streamline data selection processes in various SAP functionalities, improving efficiency and data accuracy.

 https://www.s4hclub.com/sap-library.html

entry.title: Journal Entry - Change (Asynchronous) to update CD amount
entry.content:
Hi,

We need to update the CD amount on Journal Entry, and we are using Journal Entry - Change (Asynchronous). to do so. However, I can't see an option to change the CD amount. How can I achieve this?

Journal Entry - Change (Asynchronous).

@SAPSupport : please help.

FIN Treasury FIN Posting and Taxes

entry.title: Managed Router SESSION_CONTEXT db module APPLICATIONUSER vcap
entry.content:
Hello,

I am build a CAP model project with a managed router with UI. All xsuaa roles is working as expected when coming through the CAP services.

However, when trying to access SESSION_CONTEXT at the DB module. APPLICATIONUSER is returning vcap.

The same issue was raised before as below but the solution provided not applicable as the cds version is higher here.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/session-context-application-user-in-cap/qaq-p/12145018

The only difference I can see is that I am using the managed approuter. Seems like the user logged in is not passing to the session_context at the db level.

Hope somebody can shed some light into the matter.

Anand

entry.title: sap hana certification
entry.content:
Hi all,
 
I want to appear for the C_HANAIMP_18 exam. However, I have noticed that it will expire by 28th March 2024. Since there is not enough time to prepare for the exam, I don't want to register before 28th March. I am unable to find any other certifications suitable for SAP Hana after that. Does anyone know if any other certifications related to SAP Hana will be available from April. Thanks in advance.
 
Regards
Priyanka

entry.title: HI All I am very new SLT.how can we supress leading zeros
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am New SLT how can we Suppress leading zeros in SLT  replication? we have sources system S/4 Hana in-built SLT. Target SAP HANA on cloud, we see in these fields when data is being written to ACDOCA table in SAP HANA on cloud. We have master table field length 15 actual value 12345 but when SLT replication form source to target we sseeing additional zero add before the actual value of 000012345 is any way to fix this issue.

entry.title: Hello everyone! How can i migrate my data In S4/HANA on premise, from "T" system to "P"?
Segregating Tables based on Modules
entry.content:
Hi

I have a requirement to segregate tables based on SAP Modules(MM, PP, PM etc.). Found a way... there is an FM - RS_COMPONENT_VIEW_DISPLAY which displays standard tables based on modules and their sub modules in a tree format(Below Format).

The problem here is I am not getting the table names yet from inside the debugger but I got the modules and sub-modules.

Now here I want to display those tables in an f4 format under maybe a tab-/strip for each module or a tree structure where all the tables would come under a specific module not under a sub module(Below Format).

If there is any way to achieve this through this FM or maybe any other approach to do this, Please suggest.

Regards,

Farhan

entry.title: How can I connect my HDI Container of my SAP Hana Cloud with my SAP Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I need help with this problem. I need to extract some data from an HDI Container in my Hana Cloud to use in my PowerBi. However, I cannot access the data because it says I don't have permission. I have already tried to use the SAP Data Datasphere trial. So, here is my question: how can I connect my HDI Container in my SAP Hana Cloud with SAP Data Intelligence? All my accounts are free, so is there some problem? I created this HDI Container with the SAP BAS.

entry.title: how to compare Calculation view field structure between two SAP HANA system environments?
entry.content:
I have a task to identify difference in HANA calculation views fields structure between  quality and preproduction system.

I have many number of calculation views to be compared. please let me know if there a automatic way to compare the difference in Field structure of HANA calculation views?

Regards,
Naiduz

entry.title: Sorting issue with STRING_AGG in Hana Table function
entry.content:
hello Experts,

My requirement is to Aggregate the values in a sorted manner as below.

 

currently the code is as below.

FUNCTION .cs.I072-SB_Reporting.BUSINESSLOGIC.TABLE_FUNCTION::TF_SB_EFF_MSN_CONCAT" ( )
RETURNS TABLE(
"SB_NUMBER" NVARCHAR(10),
"MSN_LIST" NVARCHAR(5000),
"MSN_COUNT" INTEGER
)
LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
SQL SECURITY INVOKER AS
BEGIN
/*********************************
Merge all active status in single cell
 **********************************/

 return SELECT "SB_NUMBER",
   STRING_AGG("MSN",',') AS "MSN_LIST" ,
   COUNT("MSN") AS "MSN_COUNT"
FROM
(
SELECT DISTINCT
"SB_NUMBER",
CONCAT('X', lpad("MSN",5,'0')) AS "MSN"
FROM "INTERNAL_1S79"."class-Reporting.TABLEDEF::EFF.ZT_EFFECT_MSN_SB" as "ZT_EFFECT_MSN_SB"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "_SYS_BIC"."class-Reporting.BASE/CV_XCS_ZDCI0T_SB_REVI" as "CV_XCS_ZDCI0T_SB_REVI"
ON "ZT_EFFECT_MSN_SB".SB_NUMBER = "CV_XCS_ZDCI0T_SB_REVI"."SB_NUM"
WHERE ( "MSN" NOT IN ('425', '441', '434', '444', '482', '484', '522', '523') AND "CV_XCS_ZDCI0T_SB_REVI"."AC_TYPE" = '2')
OR "CV_XCS_ZDCI0T_SB_REVI"."AC_TYPE" <> '2'
order by "MSN", "SB_NUMBER"
)

group by "SB_NUMBER"  ;
END;

But I am getting results as below. The string aggregation is not in sorted manner

 

I want to implement similar logic which is below in console but I am getting error while using Order  by with STRING_AGG function.

Here I am getting correct values but while trying to implement below code in Table function I am getting error as "Syntax error. "order" is incorrect or misplaced."

Please help me how can I achieve above results in Table functions.

entry.title: Is direct SAP HANA database connectivity permitted in RISE - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Our objective is to integrate SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition (RISE) with our Data Warehouse system, utilizing ODBC-based connectivity to establish a direct connection with the SAP HANA database.

We are keen to ascertain the feasibility of establishing direct ODBC connectivity to the SAP HANA database within the SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud RISE Edition. Your insights on this matter would be greatly valued as we proceed with our integration plans.

Kind regards, Vijay

entry.title: CPTA authorization request
entry.content:
Hi team

We are doing some testing after SAP migration to HANA following below steps:

  1. MIGO Goods Issue (coil)
  2. MIGO - Goods Receipt (coil)
  3. QA02 - Enter Lab Test Results
  4. QA32 - Assign Coil Usage Decision
  5. LT10 - Warehouse Movement (coil)
  6. CORZ - Process Confirmation

     When saving we got an error: "You are not authorized to use transaction CPTA". This Tcode is used just for FICO Month end users. Is there a different process we should follow?

entry.title: Custom Business Object SAP HANA
entry.content: How will SLT enabling works in CBO ? Is it same as normal DB Table because every CBO will have underlying DB Table ?

entry.title: Error while deploying CDS based services on on premise HANA system.
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

We are trying to deploy a project with db module having a HANA calculation view which further being consumed to create a cds based service using srv node js module. While it is working when we build and test locally, the deployment is failing with below error. Can anyone please guide me in fixing the issue? Please find the package.json (project level and srv module level) and MTA.yaml files in the attachments

/hana/shared/<SID>/xs/app_working/<SYSTEM ALIAS>/executionroot/8db36740-9455-4ff1-aee3-b9c51994fd5f/startCommand: line 8: exec: /hana/shared/<SID>/xs/app_working/<SYSTEM_ALIAS>/executionroot/8db36740-9455-4ff1-aee3-b9c51994fd5f/app/node_modules/.bin/cds-serve: cannot execute: Permission denied

Thanks in advance

Best Regards
Srujan

entry.title: Sap Hana Online Table Partitioning - Example
entry.content:
What is Hana Partitioning?

The partitioning feature of the SAP HANA database splits column-store tables horizontally into disjunctive sub-tables or partitions. In this way, large tables can be broken down into smaller, more manageable parts. Partitioning is typically used in multiple-host systems, but it may also be beneficial in single-host systems. Typical advantages of partitioning are e.g. partition pruning and an improved performance of the delta merge operation.

Furthermore, keep in mind that execution of the partitioning can take a long time, has a relatively high memory consumption and requires an exclusive lock (only selects are allowed).
But with the right partitioning which fits to the where clause of a SQL statement, only a single partition has to be accessed in best case. And the result is a better query performance and a faster and leaner delta merge operation

Below is example for CE11000 table :

As a pre-requisite need to check below parameter : SML - statement Memory Limit

1) In our case it was set to 100GB.

SML was changed to 300GB

2) we need to set log_mode to overwrite & enable_auto_log_backup to no

Now go to LTRC - Respective schema -> Suspend CE11000 table 

Add Partition command under -> LTRS -> Advance Replication settings -> Table settings ->

PARTITION BY HASH (BELNR) PARTITIONS 8 , as shown below and save

Now login into HANA Studio which has SYSTEM ID roles to run Alter query

Thread Details :

 

Query took ~53 minutes

Post completion:

SML was changed back to 100GB post completion. As a best practice SML should be 2*Table_HANA_MEMEORY + 50GB(Delta working space).

Resume the replication of CE11000 post completion of online partition to clear off all logging table entries.

Refer below OSS notes :

2044468 - FAQ: SAP HANA Partitioning

2418299 - SAP HANA: Partitioning Best Practices / Examples for SAP Tables

entry.title: What is diffrence beween SAP HANA and SAP Native Hana?Both are same?
entry.content: What is diffrence beween SAP HANA and SAP Native Hana?Both are same?

entry.title: Call SeriesService_GetDocumentSeries in Service Layer javascript
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

i having issue on how to get document series list in service layer (javascript). i can not call this SeriesService_GetDocumentSeries in service layer.

is there any way to get document series in service layer?

Thank you.

entry.title: "How can your organization benefit from running SAP HANA® on IBM® Power®?"
entry.content:
Are you ready to uncover the truth behind the myths surrounding running SAP HANA® on IBM Power®? Join us for an eye-opening webinar where we delve deep into how your organization can truly benefit from this powerful combination!

📅 Date: 18th of April

⏰ Time: 10.30 am CET

📍 Location: Online 

REGISTRATION https://ibm.onemob.com/p/ibmpowersap

During this exclusive webinar, we will:

🔍 Bust common myths surrounding SAP HANA® on IBM Power®.

🚀 Explore the unparalleled advantages and benefits of this dynamic duo.

💡 Provide real-world insights and success stories from IBM clients.

🔒 Address any doubts or concerns you may have about making the switch in the live questions session.

Whether you're already considering SAP HANA® on IBM Power® or simply curious about its potential impact on your organization, this webinar is a must-attend event!

Don't miss out on this opportunity to gain invaluable knowledge and unlock the true potential of your business. Reserve your spot today and let's debunk the myths together!

Register by clicking the link below (IBM secured platform)

https://ibm.onemob.com/p/ibmpowersap

SAP HANA SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP HANA service for SAP BTP SAP HANA accelerator for SAP ASE SAP enhancement package for SAP ERP, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: how to Setup a Rebate Threshold limit in Contract condition Record
entry.content: Requirement - in SAP S/4 Hana, Rebates can only give 1000$ threshold value, and there will not be any more rebates applicable. How can this achievable. Please help!!
